vocab.example: I am currently employed in the financial sector to earn a livelihood while gaining practical experience.

vocab.meaning: lịch học tập khắt khe/dày đặc
vocab.example: As a medical student, I have to manage a rigorous academic schedule that leaves very little room for leisure.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng tầm hiểu biết/kiến thức
vocab.example: I decided to pursue a degree in Philosophy to broaden my horizons and challenge my existing worldviews.

vocab.meaning: môi trường (làm việc) tốc độ nhanh, áp lực
vocab.example: Working in a marketing agency means I have to thrive in a fast-paced environment with tight deadlines.

vocab.meaning: vùi đầu vào học tập, nghiên cứu
vocab.example: With the final exams approaching, I have to hit the books every single night to ensure I don't fall behind.

vocab.meaning: sự thăng tiến trong nghề nghiệp
vocab.example: I often take on extra projects at work because I am highly motivated by the prospect of career advancement.

vocab.meaning: giáo dục bậc đại học/cao đẳng
vocab.example: I am currently in my second year of tertiary education, majoring in International Business.
My current internship provides me with invaluable hands-on experience that textbooks simply cannot offer.

vocab.meaning: thị trường việc làm đầy cạnh tranh
vocab.example: I’m focusing on gaining niche certifications to stay relevant in today’s highly competitive job market.

vocab.meaning: đa nhiệm một cách hiệu quả
vocab.example: My role as a project coordinator requires me to multitask effectively across several different departments.
